content.en:
Ye Tian left the No. 3 Ancient Nest and returned to the Star Ancient Giant City.

As soon as possible, he came to visit Xuanhuang Daozu.

He wanted to learn about the Nine-Story Building from Xuanhuang Daozu, otherwise he didn't know anything, so he joined the Nine-Story Building, which was naturally not good.

"Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor, do you know the Nine-Story Building?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course I know!" Xuanhuang Daozu smiled, "I know that your life level has reached 6.5, and it seems that the Ninth Floor invited you to join." Don't worry, you can join. And if you join the Nine-Story Building, your future is unlimited! The boundary of the Hanhai District is still too small, and only by joining the Nine-Story Building can you see a wider world!"

As soon as Xuanhuang Daozu said this, Ye Tian made a decision.

Nine-story building, it is inevitable to join!

......

Soon after, Ye Tian contacted Gushan Daozu and indicated that he wanted to join the Nine-Story Building.

Immediately.

Ye Tian and Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor met again.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, follow me to the Nine-Fold Building's Hanhai Yellow Mansion at the boundary of the Hanhai District!" Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor said.

"Hanhai Yellow Building?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

At this time, Gu Shan Daozu explained: "The Nine-Story Building is very powerful, and it has many members, and there are many peripheral members. Moreover, many members of the nine-story building are scattered all over the country, so there is a branch building in many regional boundaries. The nine-story building is divided into the Yellow Building, the Xuan Building, the Ground Building and the Sky Building. Endless Dao Ancestor, you have just joined the Nine-Fold Building, and you can only enter the Yellow Building. If you want to become an official member of the Xuanlou, there are only two ways, the first way is to be promoted to the Eightfold Ancestor, and the second way is to accumulate points and pass the assessment of the Xuanlou, as for what the assessment requirements are, you will know when you join the Yellow Building. "

"The Eightfold Origin Ancestor can only join the Xuanlou!"

Ye Tian gasped.

In this way, aren't all those members of the Heavenly Tower at least the Ninefold Ancestor, or are they incomparably demonic beings?

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to follow Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor to a silent Black Sea region.

Abrupt.

The void in front of him distorted, and an ancient nest emerged.

"This is the No. 1 Ancient Nest, which was transformed into the Hanhai Yellow Building by the Nine-Story Building!"

Gu Mountain Daozu introduced.

"Nest No. 1!"

Ye Tian was shocked, the big arm of the Nine-Story Building was just a branch of the deserted building, and it actually transformed the No. 1 Ancient Nest into a headquarters.

The other forces in the Hanhai region can't do it!

Airplanes!!

Ye Tian and Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor escaped into the Hanhai Yellow Tower.

......

After entering the Hanhai Yellow Tower, Ye Tian didn't see many Dao Ancestors here.

"Endless Dao Ancestors, there are currently a total of seventy-three Dao Ancestors in the Hanhai Yellow Building, of which seventy are peripheral members, and only three are official members. Now that you have joined the Endless Dao Ancestor, you will be four official members!"

Gu Mountain Daozu said.

Subsequently, Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian to conduct the life level test again, which was a necessary process.

Only by testing in the Yellow Building can the data be transmitted and approved by the Nine-Story Building.

Soon, the tests were completed.

Life level 6.5!

But Ye Tian has not officially become a member of the Nine-Story Building, after all, Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor is only a peripheral member, and he has the authority to recommend, but he does not have the authority to appoint.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, when a member of the Xuanlou arrives, we can go through the formalities for you to join the Nine-Fold Building!" said Gushan Dao Ancestor.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

It didn't take long for an eightfold ancestor to appear in the Hanhai Yellow Tower.

This is not an ordinary Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, but an Eightfold Primordial Ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and if he can join the Ninefold Building, his strength will inevitably surpass that of the Eightfold Ancestor who has generally comprehended the Ninefold Origin Path.

When Ye Tian saw this member of the Xuanlou, he felt the oppression in the underworld, and he was stronger than him, I don't know how many times.

"I've seen Lord Chenming Daozu!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor said respectfully.

Although he is a half-step Eightfold Ancestor, compared to the Morning Singing Dao Ancestor, he is simply an ant.

Even if he becomes the original ancestor of Yae in the future, he will still be an ant!

"I've seen Lord Chenming Daozu!"

Ye Tian also said respectfully.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, I received an order from the Nine-Fold Building to handle the formalities for you to join the Nine-Fold Building, this is the Nine-Fold Building Seal that only the official members of the Nine-Fold Building have, after refining, others cannot take it, once you fall, this Nine-Fold Building Seal will be shattered!" Chenming Dao Ancestor took out a seal and said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian took over the Nine-Fold Building Seal.

Subsequently, many of Ye Tian's information were entered into the nine-story building one by one, and after many procedures, he finally completed the joining.

At this point, Ye Tiancai can be regarded as a real official member of the Nine-Story Building.

And Chenming Dao Ancestor left quickly, after all, he was a member of the Xuanlou, so naturally he would not stay here.

......

After joining the Nine-Story Building, Ye Tian met another official member of the Hanhai Yellow Building, the Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor.

As for the other two full members, they have been away for a long time and are therefore not here at the moment.

As soon as he joined the Jiuju Building, his identity and status directly changed, and he became one of the deputy owners of the Hanhai Yellow Building.

And because Gushan Daozu tapped a full member, he also received a reward from the Nine-Story Building and a promotion to his position this time.

His current status was directly promoted to the deacon second only to the position of deputy building owner, which was also the limit for peripheral members to be promoted in the Yellow Building.

If he is promoted again, he can only enter the Xuanlou and become a peripheral member of the Xuanlou.

However, if the cultivation is not high, it is not a good thing to enter the periphery of the Xuanlou.

......

"After entering the Nine-Story Building, I can only name in the Xuanyu Pavilion!"

In fact, the same is true of the other members of the Hanhai Yellow Building, most of them are in other forces, and some have even directly separated from other forces.

After all, the resources possessed by the Hanhai Yellow House were not comparable to those of other forces.

The Hanhai Yellow Tower is in charge of a large number of resources and treasure lands, such as the eighteen ancient nests in the Hanhai District, six of which are completely controlled by the Hanhai Yellow Tower, and the other ancient nests, the Hanhai Yellow Tower can also intervene.

For example, the No. 3 Ancient Nest, Hanhai Yellow Mansion can intervene, and even let the Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor sit there for a long time, and control the Ancient River of Life.

This is the strength of Hanhai Yellow Building!

Regarding the strength of the Hanhai Yellow Tower, the Hanhai Palace did not dare to say anything.

In the years after becoming an official member of the Hanhai Yellow Tower, Ye Tian has been browsing some of the inherited knowledge of the Hanhai Yellow Tower, where he has secret knowledge that is not circulated in the outside world, and now it is open to him.

Moreover, he finally knew why the Nine-Fold Building had such high requirements for the life level, and the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor could not join the Nine-Fold Building if he did not reach the life level 6.

In fact, reaching life level 6 is only the minimum requirement.
